display_information.name: blade
display_information.description: Pushes Slack messages into a running Claude Code session.
display_information.long_description: blade is a Claude Code channel. Messages posted by allowlisted senders are pushed into a Claude Code session already running on a local machine, where Claude can act on the developer's real files and working state, then answer back in the same thread. Unlike a hosted assistant, no code or context leaves the machine the session runs on.
